responsibilities: Develop corporate growth strategies by analyzing market trends, competitive dynamics, and emerging opportunities across industries
Lead market entry assessments evaluating total addressable market, competitive landscape, and go-to-market approach for new ventures
Build financial models to evaluate strategic options including organic growth, partnerships, and acquisition scenarios
Conduct competitive benchmarking to identify white space opportunities and inform client positioning and differentiation strategy
Facilitate executive strategy workshops to align leadership on long-term vision, priorities, and strategic trade-offs
Synthesize market research and financial analysis into compelling strategic narratives presented to senior executive stakeholders
Evaluate potential M&A targets and partnership opportunities to support inorganic growth strategy recommendations
Develop multi-year strategic roadmaps translating high-level vision into actionable initiatives and resource requirements
